title: Intensely Winey Moroccan Duck Legs Mechoui
description: A rich and flavorful Moroccan dish featuring tender duck legs, slow cooked in a mixture of red wine and spices, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. The air fryer adds a crispy texture to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the red wine, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper.
Add the duck legs to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the duck legs marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the duck legs from the marinade and place them in the air fryer basket.
Cook the duck legs in the air fryer for 30 minutes or until they reach an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
After 30 minutes, shake the basket to redistribute the duck legs.
Continue cooking the duck legs for an additional 10-15 minutes or until they are crispy on the outside and tender on the inside.
Let the duck legs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
